response.justification: Bogdan brings over a decade of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud infrastructure, directly aligning with the role’s stack and responsibilities; his work on AI-agent infrastructure, scalable systems, and developer tooling demonstrates strong architectural judgment and cross-stack ownership.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
Proven track record in AI-agent systems and developer tooling
Strong architecture and DevOps skills (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume
German language proficiency is only basic, may hinder local collaboration
Diverse background includes many niche languages (DLang, Java) which may dilute focus
